works: CLI `shardloom route`, `shardloom run`, and `shardloom prepare`, plus `ShardLoomContext.route(...)`, `ShardLoomContext.run(...)`, `ShardLoomContext.prepare(...)`, SQL workflow `.route()`/`.run()`, and DataFrame workflow `.route()`/`.run()`/`.prepare(...)` share the same route/admission metadata. Admitted run/prepare wrappers attach that metadata to scoped runtime or preparation envelopes, and lazy DataFrame `write_parquet(...)` / `write_vortex(...)` now route through the public `run` facade while preserving typed sink reports.
blocked: The facade does not reroute broad `collect()`, general `write(...)` / `write_csv(...)`, source-free generated-output write helpers, refresh benchmark timing, or claim broad SQL/DataFrame runtime support.
